query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "when vision speaks for sound" computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on adapting Text-to-Speech (TTS) techniques for MIDI-to-audio synthesis, which is a distinct domain (music generation) from the user's implied focus on "Vision Speaks for Sound" (cross-modal audio-visual learning). While both involve audio synthesis, the paper does not measure the same biological pathway, physical observable, or causal mechanism regarding vision-to-sound translation, nor does it address the specific empirical population or variables of the user's question, fail
